PUPPET_FILE
  PsiPuppetExpressionAssignmentImpl(EXPRESSION_ASSIGNMENT)
    Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
      PsiElement($)('$')
      PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('str1')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiElement(=)('=')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
      PsiElement(DOUBLE_QUOTED_STRING)('"abacaba"')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
  PsiPuppetExpressionAssignmentImpl(EXPRESSION_ASSIGNMENT)
    Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
      PsiElement($)('$')
      PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('str2')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiElement(=)('=')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
      PsiElement(DOUBLE_QUOTED_STRING)('"aba"')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n\n')
  PsiPuppetIfStatementImpl(IF_STATEMENT)
    PsiElement(IF)('if')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetConditionalBranchImpl(CONDITIONAL_BRANCH)
      PsiPuppetExpressionParenImpl(EXPRESSION_PAREN)
        PsiElement(()('(')
        PsiPuppetExpressionRegexImpl(EXPRESSION_REGEX)
          Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
            PsiElement($)('$')
            PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('str1')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          PsiElement(=~)('=~')
          PsiErrorElement:'"/' unexpected
            <empty list>
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiElement(DOUBLE_QUOTED_STRING_START)('"/')
        PsiElement($)('$')
        PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('str2')
        PsiElement(DOUBLE_QUOTED_STRING_END)('/"')
        PsiElement())(')')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiPuppetBracedStatementsBlockImpl(BRACED_STATEMENTS_BLOCK)
        PsiElement({)('{')
        PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
        PsiPuppetFunctionCallStatementImpl(FUNCTION_CALL_STATEMENT)
          PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
            PsiElement(NAME)('notice')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
            PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''cool!'')
        PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
        PsiElement(})('}')
